what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links an attachment UUID to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-3546f95a.
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is present.
conventions: Includes id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses a board:// URI scheme to identify the target board item.
notes: A bare channel-attachment metadata stub that points a dragnet-development attachment to board item item-3546f95a.
questions: What content or state does board item item-3546f95a represent?
What is the expected payload or content for this attachment?
What semantics define the relationship between this attachment and the referenced board item?
intention_signals: To create a persistent, timestamped reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item so it can be located within channel memory.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as the target value for an attachment record.
contribution: Provides a canonical attachment record that maps an attachment UUID to a board item via a typed target and timestamp, supporting lookup and provenance without embedding payload.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file for the dragnet-development channel that registers a board_items attachment (att-b10b25fe) targeting board item item-3546f95a with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed link between a channel attachment and a board item for later retrieval or audit.
